title: Winning numbers drawn in Saturday’s Powerball
full_text:
Winning numbers drawn in Saturday’s Powerball
The winning numbers in Saturday evening’s drawing of the "Powerball" game were: 04-16-41-48-66, Powerball: 26
ByThe Associated Press
May 24, 2026, 12:10 AM
The winning numbers in Saturday evening’s drawing of the "Powerball" game were:
04-16-41-48-66, Powerball: 26, Power Play: 2
(four, sixteen, forty-one, forty-eight, sixty-six, Powerball: twenty-six, Power Play: two)
Estimated jackpot: $132 million
